description.en: Complete guide to timber fasteners. Learn about wood screws, coach screws, timber connectors, and proper selection for wood frame construction.

description.ar: دليل شامل للمثبتات الخشبية. تعلم عن مسامير الخشب ومسامير العربة وموصلات الخشب والاختيار الصحيح.

description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Holzverbindungselemente. Lernen Sie über Holzschrauben, Holzbauschrauben, Holzverbinder und正确 Auswahl.
description.hi: टिम्बर फास्टनर की पूर्ण गाइड। वुड स्क्रू, कोच स्क्रू, टिम्बर कनेक्टर, और वुड फ्रेम निर्माण के लिए उचित चयन के बारे में जानें।

keywords: timber fasteners, wood screws, coach screws, timber connectors, wood frame construction, lag screws

body.en:
Wood screws are designed for fastening wood to wood:

Types:
- Flat head: Countersinks for flush surface
- Round head: Provides bearing surface
- Bugle head: For drywall and sheathing

Key Features:
- Sharp point for easy starting
- Coarse thread for wood gripping
- Smooth shank for easy insertion
- Various lengths and gauges

Selection Tips:
- Length: 2.5x thickness of top board
- Gauge: Match to load requirements
- Head: Match to application
- Coating: Exterior use requires corrosion resistance

Coach screws (lag screws) are heavy-duty wood fasteners:

DIN 571 / ISO 8678: Hex head wood screws

Features:
- Hex head for wrench tightening
- Coarse, sharp threads
- Full thread or partial thread
- Heavy-gauge construction

Applications:
- Timber frame connections
- Deck construction
- Pergola and gazebo building
- Furniture assembly

Installation:
- Pre-drill pilot hole (especially for hard woods)
- Use washer under head
- Drive with wrench or impact driver

TradeGo coach screws are hot-dip galvanized for exterior use.

Metal connectors improve timber connection strength:

Types:
- Joist hangers: Support joists at beams
- Strap ties: Reinforce joints
- Post bases: Secure posts to concrete
- Holdowns: Resist uplift forces

Materials:
- Galvanized steel: Standard interior
- Hot-dip galvanized: Exterior/damp locations
- Stainless steel: Marine/coastal

Benefits:
- Increased load capacity
- Reduced notching of timber
- Standardized connection details
- Faster installation

cta.ja: 木材用ファスナーをご希望
